author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #24 - Star Atlas DAO Proposals is confirmed. Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   

This week the topic is Proposals! What are the main proposals the community is planning to post once the proposal system is released?   
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1003774786075365486
